sections.title: Articles (A, An, The) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Articles (A, An, The) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Articles (A, An, The) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: A/An + singular countable noun (unspecific) | The + noun (specific, already mentioned/known). Rules: Use 'a' before consonant sounds, 'an' before vowel sounds | Use 'a/an' for first mention or general reference | Use 'the' for specific things, previously mentioned things, or unique things | No article before plural general nouns or abstract nouns in general statements
sections.formula: A/An + singular countable noun (unspecific) | The + noun (specific, already mentioned/known)

examples.english: The book is on the table.
The sun rises in the east.

sections.title: Articles (A, An, The) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Articles (A, An, The) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Articles (A, An, The) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: A/An + singular countable noun (unspecific) | The + noun (specific, already mentioned/known)

examples.english: The Taj Mahal is in India.

sections.title: Articles (A, An, The) — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Articles (A, An, The) — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Articles (A, An, The) in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: A/An + singular countable noun (unspecific) | The + noun (specific, already mentioned/known)

examples.english: The Ganges river is very sacred.

sections.title: Articles (A, An, The) — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Articles (A, An, The) — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Articles (A, An, The). Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: A/An + singular countable noun (unspecific) | The + noun (specific, already mentioned/known)

examples.english: That opportunity will not come again.
